# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2%%
<script lang="ts">
	// Block comment between `export` and `default` on a decorated class expression —
	// the decorators print on their own line, the comment stays after `export`
	export default /* c */

	@dec
	class {}
</script>

%%PASS=3 (fixed point)%%
<script lang="ts">
	// Block comment between `export` and `default` on a decorated class expression —
	// the decorators print on their own line, the comment stays after `export`
	export default /* c */


	@dec
	class {}
</script>
